Additional Yield Layer
for LRT: Cross-Chain
Put your LRTs to work and scale together with the growth of cross-chain DeFi. Provide LRT liquidity to Mitosis L2 pools and start sharing the Mitosis protocol cross-chain transfer fees. 
LRT’s Multi-Chain Expansion
Has Already Begun
As chain deployment becomes more accessible and more L2 applications start supporting LRTs, the demand for cross-chain transfers of LRTs is poised to surge.
Additional Yield Layer
for LRT: Cross-Chain
Put your LRTs to work and scale together with the growth of cross-chain DeFi. Provide LRT liquidity to Mitosis L2 pools and start sharing the Mitosis protocol cross-chain transfer fees. 
Stay Liquid.
Stay Composable
LRTs locked in Mitosis retain composability as $miLRT, a 1:1 representation of the deposited assets. Unlock the utilization potential of your LP assets by participating in $miLRT-based DeFi applications.
Join the Mitosis Expedition Now
When LRT Meets Cross-Chain
Add the cross-chain transfer fee exposure to your ETH staking yield stack.

Start earning MITO Points, continue receiving existing LRT rewards, and explore the $miLRT DeFi ecosystem.
Add the cross-chain transfer fee exposure to your ETH staking yield stack.

Start earning MITO Points, continue receiving existing LRT rewards, and explore the $miLRT DeFi ecosystem.
How It Works
❶
Deposit your LRT and receive $miLRT
Become eligible for privileges and benefits on Mitosis mainnet
❷
Earn MITO Points by completing Missions and collecting Badges
Become eligible for privileges and benefits on Mitosis mainnet
❸
Continue earning EigenLayer and LRT point rewards
Become eligible for privileges and benefits on Mitosis mainnet
❹
Become eligible for privileges and benefits on Mitosis mainnet
Stack your Yield with Mitosis Expedition
✓ Seamless Deposit/Withdrawal with $miLRT
✓ Seamless Deposit/
Withdrawal with $miLRT
Deposit your LRT to Mitosis and receive $miLRT. Let Mitosis efficiently and securely bridge your assets to L2 rollups using its proprietary batching solution. Easily retrieve your LRT by burning your $miLRTs.
✓ Add MITO Points to Your LRT Earnings
Jump into Expedition and start earning your MITO Points. Boost up your earnings by depositing, making referrals, and collecting various Badges offered by the Expedition campaign. Become eligible to convert your MITO Points to the Mitosis governance tokens of the Mitosis protocol.
✓ $miLRT DeFi Ecosystem (Coming Soon)
Maximize your LRT’s utilization by letting your $miLRTs earn on the Mitosis DeFi applications. Stay liquid and gain exposure in various DeFi use cases while adding a yield layer of cross-chain DeFi to your LRT yield stack.
Mitosis is the first cross-chain liquidity protocol

to imbue composability to today’s underutilized

cross-chain assets.
Partnership with Hyperlane
Permissionless interoperability meets cross-chain = scalable, composable liquidity protocol for multi-chain era
CosmWasm Hyperlane Development
For interoperability of future Celestia and Cosmos networks
● The Expedition LRT Campaign
Yield from cross-chain transfers and MITO Points added to EigenLayer and LRT points
Incentivized Public Testnet
Various $miAsset-based gamified programs to earn the Mitosis governance tokens on mainnet
Mitosis Mainnet
Launch of the liquidity layer of the multi-chain era and the Mitosis DeFi ecosystem utilizing $miAssets
Added Security from Restaked ETH
Protocol security reinforced by partnership with Ethos and Hyperlane AVS
